Synth.
Docs Quick Start Examples Mission Studio Architecture Community First Contact

The Result

The user is invited to install SYNTH and create their first Mission.

Proof

The governed pipeline accepted the journey. Overall verdict: PASS. Seeded events: 25. Execution intents: 6. Total events: 32.

Your Turn

The user is invited to install SYNTH and create their first Mission.

human:

curl -fsSL https://synth.dev/install.sh | sh

human:

synth doctor

human:

synth init

human:

synth mission create --subject "Space Mission Tracker" --purpose "Track missions, crew, and launch windows."

Known limitations

This recording (Archive B) runs on the hardened pipeline: aggregate relationship validation, signed snapshot persistence, and graph-integrity proof are exercised and passing — see The Evidence for the Archive A/B comparison. What a single 32-event journey does not prove is scale: larger missions and longer histories remain the subject of continued validation.

Projected from the canonical evidence archive (Archive B, hardened pipeline) · ← Back to Synth
